title: SmartRecipes
description: SmartRecipes is a Minecraft datapack that adds 85 new crafting recipes to help players.
body:
SmartRecipes, give new meaning to crafting in Minecraft! This datapack adds 85 simple, useful, and balanced recipes designed to make your life easier without breaking the vanilla experience. You can even smelt concrete powder into colored glass, or finally craft previously uncraftable items like the enchanted golden apple or chainmail armor. Perfect for survival, multiplayer servers, or rediscovering Minecraft with more possibilities without changing its original spirit. All recipes are shown in the gallery.
Feel free to ask me questions about the datapack or send me your suggestions directly on the server discord:https:https://discord.gg/X4WZepFGgF
